summary: Backend API testing completed for Vivo BI Dashboard iteration 5 (complete rebuild with 6 NEW endpoints). All 24 tests passed. Verified: (1) NEW /api/customers returns all 8 fields with weighted avg aggregation for multi-country, (2) NEW /api/customer-trend returns daily rows with multi-country merge, (3) NEW /api/footfall returns ~28 locations with channel filter, (4) NEW /api/subcategory-sales returns subcategory data with multi-country merge, (5) NEW /api/subcategory-stock-sales returns stock/sales data, (6) NEW /api/stock-to-sales returns location data with deduplication. All existing endpoints still work.

minor.issue: churn_rate field missing from aggregated response. Single-country returns churn_rate, but multi-country aggregation doesn't compute/include it.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add churn_rate to multi-country /api/customers aggregation (currently missing from aggregated response)
critical_code_review_comments: Weighted average aggregation for /api/customers verified: avg_customer_spend and avg_orders_per_customer correctly computed as weighted averages
Multi-country merge for /api/customer-trend verified: daily totals correctly summed per day
Deduplication for /api/stock-to-sales verified: unique (location, country) pairs
Sort stability verified: /api/top-skus?country=Kenya sorted by total_sales desc, /api/sor?country=Kenya sorted by sor_percent desc
All existing endpoints from iteration 4 still work (regression passed)
test_credentials: None required - read-only public API proxy
seed_data_creation: None - uses external Vivo BI API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 complete. All 6 NEW endpoints verified: /api/customers (weighted avg aggregation), /api/customer-trend (daily merge), /api/footfall (channel filter), /api/subcategory-sales (multi-country merge), /api/subcategory-stock-sales, /api/stock-to-sales (deduplication). Date range 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-17 has data. Minor issue: churn_rate missing from multi-country /api/customers aggregation.
